label: paper_gain_not_progress
description: A2.4 — paper_gain=True, is_progress=False, stale not rising → is_error=False. Agent reads src/a.py (enters U → progress at t=0). Then at t=1 runs pytest on tests/test_a.py. No new file in U, no obligation closed → is_progress=False. But this is the FIRST test_run in the current no-progress segment while an obligation is pending → paper_gain=True → err=False (|T|=1, goal_pending so exploit_goal case).
